author: claude
content: Phase-1 DONE: feat/bidi-on-hardening → draft PR #1196 (stacks on #1180). #1174 & #1129 = two finalize-ack channels at different layers (control-socket extension→BM ack vs data-socket SC→client ack); kept #1174's framing-safe receive(), adapted #1129's finalize_visit_id_with_ack onto it. Back-channel primitive for Phase-3: DataSocket.finalize_visit_id_with_ack(visit_id, success, timeout) blocks on ClientSocket.receive(). NEEDS-HUMAN: the data-socket back-channel is wired-but-UNCALLED — #1129's TaskManager call-site was dropped (depended on an abandoned branch; on master FinalizeCommand→extension sends finalize). R1 (finalize-ack drain) likely OVERLAPS #1174's already-landed FinalizeCommand-blocks-on-ack — needs a human to (a) confirm R1 isn't already done by #1174 and (b) pick the data-socket call-site. R2/R3/R4 entangle with this. Only R5 (logger-socket drain, mp_logger.py:229) is a clean independent autonomous unit.
